title: Why Lumentum (LITE) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Lumentum (LITE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: 7 Cheap Stocks That Wall Street Analysts Still Love
text: As of yesterday's close, the S&P 500 had tumbled more than 25% in 2022. This year will be one of the worst for the S&P ever.
